name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 large baking potatoes, baked, cooked, peeled and cubed (4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large soup kettle.
2. Stir in flour and heat until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Add potatoes and onion; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add remaining ingredients; stir until cheese is melted.
7. Serve immediately. Yields about 2 1/2 quarts.
